summary: Adjusted the chapter seam at the entry and exit so it hands off more cleanly from Mallick's Chapter 5 urgency and into Doug's Chapter 7 basement/upstairs split without changing Chapter 6's core beats.
edits: Reframed the opening around Nate's voicemail fixation instead of starting on another basement-object action, to distinguish it from the adjacent chapter opening scaffold while preserving the same information.
Added a light continuity stitch when Mallick reaches Nate so her quick follow-up tracks more closely with the prior chapter's 'I need Griggs now' handoff.
Changed the final beat from Mallick resuming her notes to Nate anticipating his too-loud performance of calm upstairs, creating a cleaner transition into Chapter 7.
